title: New Devil May Cry Season 2 Trailer Shares Fresh Look at Classic Villains
content: Netflix has seen significant success in adapting beloved video game franchises into animated series, with producer Adi Shankar a major reason for the streaming platform’s track record. Following the recent introduction of Dante in Devil May Cry season one, the Capcom demon hunter is returning on May 12th.
author: ComicBook

title: Ryuya Suzuki's Debut Feature Anime Film Jinsei Reveals English-Subtitled Trailer, June 5 U.S. Debut
content: Greenwich Entertainment revealed an English-subtitled video and a poster on Tuesday for Jinsei ( Mumei no Jinsei ), the first feature anime film from independent anime director Ryūya Suzuki . Greenwich Entertainment will screen the film in New York theaters on June 5, before a nationwide release on June 12.
author: ANN

title: Animated Devil May Cry Show's 2nd Season Unveils New Trailer, Key Art
content: Netflix unveiled a new trailer and key art for the second season of the animated series of CAPCOM 's Devil May Cry video game franchise on Tuesday. The second season will premiere on May 12. The first season from Studio Mir premiered in April 2025 with eight episodes featuring the characters Dante, Vergil, and Lady.
author: ANN

title: Splatoon Raiders Game's Trailer Reveals July 23 Release
content: Nintendo began streaming on Tuesday a trailer for Splatoon Raiders , a new single-player spinoff game in its Splatoon series, and it reveals that the game will launch on July 23 for Nintendo Switch 2. The vdieo previews gadgets, weapons, and characters.
author: ANN

title: Devil May Cry Season 2 Drops New Official Trailer & Key Visual Ahead of May 12 Release
content: Netflix has shared the second official trailer for Devil May Cry Season 2, along with a new key visual featuring Dante and Vergil. The first season of the animated series was released on Netflix on April 3, while the sequel announcement came just a week later.
author: Anime Corner

title: Titan Manga Reveals English Previews of Record Journey, High Elf with a Long Life Manga
content: Titan Manga revealed English-language previews of Ryoichiro Kezuka 's Record Journey ( Onban Kikō ) manga and rarutori , Ciavis , and Kō Narita 's High Elf with a Long Life ( Tensei Shite High Elf ni Narimashita ga, Slow Life wa 120-nen de Akimashita ) manga on Tuesday.
author: ANN

title: Lost Cartoon Network Movie Returns Thanks to Franchise Revival
content: Cartoon Network hasn’t just been a host for countless animated series; the cable network has also stored some major films as a part of its ever-expanding library. In its past, the platform has created films for beloved franchises such as The Powerpuff Girls, Foster’s Home For Imaginary Friends, Dexter’s Laboratory,…
author: ComicBook

title: KILL BLUE Releases Creditless Opening Directed by Chainsaw Man's Ryu Nakayama at Studio Andraft
content: KILL BLUE anime has released its creditless opening animation video, directed by Chainsaw Man Season 1 director Ryu Nakayama and featuring the OP song “ATTITUDE” by aespa. Studio CUE is in charge of the animation production, with Hiro Kaburagi ( Kimi ni Todoke , GREAT PRETENDER ) as the director.
author: Anime Corner

title: Additional Cast for 'Tongari Boushi no Atelier' Announced
content: The official website of the Tongari Boushi no Atelier ( Witch Hat Atelier ) television anime revealed additional cast on Monday. The anime series adapting Kamome Shirahama 's fantasy manga began airing on April 6 at 11:00 p.m. on Tokyo MX, BS11, followed by KBS Kyoto, Sun TV, and AT-X.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Sanrio Unveils 1st Game Brand With Sanrio Party Land Game
content: Sanrio announced its first official game brand Sanrio Games on Tuesday, and revealed the brand's first game Sanrio Party Land , which will simultaneously launch worldwide this fall for Nintendo Switch and Switch 2.
author: ANN
